\tzpentry{ID3834}{Given Torsion Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3834 introduces Given Torsion Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(t\) is given by \[ \tau_t: \Psi(t) \longmapsto g(t)\cdot\Psi(t), \] where \(g(t) = (\mathrm{e}^{\mathrm{i}\theta(t)}, R(\alpha(t),\beta(t),\gamma(t)))\)
\]
